fields.description: Schema configuration for data validation. Use 'schema: {mode: observed}' to infer types from data, or provide explicit field definitions with mode (fixed/flexible).
fields.label: Schema
fields.name: schema

fields.description: Database table name to write rows into.
fields.label: Table
fields.name: table

fields.description: Whether to append to an existing table or replace it before writing.
fields.label: If Exists
fields.name: if_exists
